_comment: PML coroutine A/B on bare metal: run_bench builds 3 movi-co variants (LTO-reuse, LTO-inline, no-LTO-inline) from the source and times them at W=8, plus per-source-line PEBS (cycles) on the LTO-reuse binary to find the residual hotspot vs the hand-inlined loop. Public genome-idx inputs downloaded unsigned; results uploaded via the cross-account upload role (no permanent creds).
